appliedUpdates.description: Added architecture guidance that first-write server actions inserting into user-foreign-key tables should call syncUser() before inserts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit fallback path when Clerk/Cloudflare blocks authenticated headless browser flows, including accepted alternative evidence and required handoff wording.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Observed across multiple conversion reviews (`recipe-conversion-page`, `recipes-list-and-detail`) where required authenticated browser checks were blocked by known headless auth challenges.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document src/middleware.ts location as a special convention.
